title: Casanova 70
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Mario Monicelli
actors: Marcello Mastroianni, Virna Lisi, Marisa Mell
plot: The amorous adventures of Andrea Rossi-Colombotti, an army officer who finds pleasure with beautiful women in life-threatening situations.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 1 nomination total
